description_long: This is a stone obelisk featuring a sculpted human head at the top, reminiscent of a bust, set upon a tall, rectangular pedestal. The surface of the obelisk is rough and weathered, with visible signs of age and moss or lichen growth, especially on the upper and rear sections. A metallic plaque is affixed to the front of the pedestal, likely bearing an inscription or dedication. The base of the obelisk is square and sits on a patch of uneven ground with grass and soil, suggesting it is installed outdoors. The overall form is monolithic, with the bust seamlessly integrated into the upper portion of the pedestal. The object exudes a sense of permanence and commemorative purpose, typical of monuments found in parks or public squares.
description: A weathered stone obelisk with a sculpted human head atop a tall pedestal, featuring a metal plaque and mossy surface, set on a grassy base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sculpted head, the rectangular pedestal, and a clearly visible metal plaque on the front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the pedestal, the profile of the head, and the rough, mossy texture along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head and pedestal, with pronounced weathering and moss growth, and no visible plaque.
description_view_3: Angled front-side view showing both the head's features and the plaque, as well as the textured base and ground.
attribute_inscription: There is a metal plaque on the front face of the pedestal, likely containing an inscription, but the text is not legible in the images.
attribute_ornamentation: The only ornamentation is the sculpted human head at the top of the obelisk, which is detailed and realistic in style.
attribute_base_design: The base is a simple, square platform integrated with the pedestal, made of the same stone material, and sits directly on a patch of grass and soil.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is formed by the sculpted head, which is detailed and rounded, seamlessly emerging from the top of the rectangular pedestal.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by a patch of grass and soil, with no other notable features or objects immediately adjacent.
